reason: Acceptance criteria and rejected out-of-scope items to verify.
Verify font implementation keeps Google first and local fallback second.
Verify SSE implementation preserves auth, payload shape, and removes fixed polling loops.
Verify Workbox migration preserves navigation/assets behavior and avoids static media caching.
Check frontend behavior and browser smoke expectations.
Check frontend API type contracts and no duplicate page-local response shapes.
Check PWA app shell and asset fallback contract.
Check backend route/session/error behavior for stream endpoints.
Check task status/static media contracts remain intact.
Check cross-layer/code-reuse concerns for multi-layer changes.
